essential_mechanics.constant_equal_performance: PASS — Relative Trend and Relative Momentum converge to 100.
essential_mechanics.leadership_loss: PASS — momentum crosses first; Weakening precedes Lagging.
essential_mechanics.missing_observations: PASS — no zero fill or fabricated tail; continuity breaks.
essential_mechanics.new_improvement_after_underperformance: PASS — momentum crosses first; Improving precedes Leading.
essential_mechanics.persistent_outperformance: PASS — trend remains above 100 while momentum leads then settles toward 100.
essential_mechanics.recovery: PASS — Lagging to Improving to Leading occurs without a forced cycle.
essential_mechanics.temporary_shock: PASS — robust scaling bounds the shock and coordinates return to neutral.
essential_mechanics.universe_membership_change: PASS — another theme's membership has zero coordinate effect.
